description: Detonate a bomb with 5 or more radius.
hint: Use cards that increase bomb radius or combine smaller bombs into larger ones before attacking them to detonate.

description: Fire 30 or more bullets in a single turn.
hint: Use cards with high multi-hit counts like Gatling guns or abilities that repeat attacks to shoot 30 times in one turn.

description: Reach a combo of 25 or more.
hint: Build your combo meter to 25+ by playing multiple zero-cost cards, energy-refunding movement cards, and utilizing high card draw in a single turn.

description: Win an encounter with 7 or more burnt cards in your hand, discard, and draw combined.
hint: Roxy is the best pilot for this. Draft cards that have the Burn keyword or add Burn to cards, and avoid purging them until the encounter ends.

description: Reach a heat sink of 7 or more.
hint: Play defensive cards that grant the Heat Sink status effect to increase your heat capacity beyond 7.

description: Win a run with a deck size of 30 or more.
hint: Accept card rewards at almost every opportunity and avoid purging cards at the shop to reach a 30+ card deck by the end of the run.

description: Win a run with a deck size of 8 or less.
hint: Skip optional card rewards and prioritize spending your resources to purge cards aggressively at Min's shop or through events.

description: Play 10 or more cards in a single turn.
hint: Focus on zero-cost cards, energy generation, and high card draw to easily chain 10+ cards in one round.

description: Purge 10 or more cards in a single encounter.
hint: Prolong a fight against enemies that shuffle Junk into your deck, and continuously use the manual throw/purge action on those Junk cards.

description: Win a run without getting struck or gaining any doom.
hint: Prioritize movement and positioning to avoid all enemy telegraphs, and kill Doom-channelers immediately. Note that shields/armor do not prevent you from 'getting struck'.

description: Win a run without gaining an artifact.
hint: Avoid picking up any artifacts from Elite rewards, chests, or shops. Rely solely on your cards and upgrades.

description: Win a run without taking any cards from rewards or the shop.
hint: Skip all card rewards after encounters and do not purchase any cards from Min. Rely entirely on your starting deck and component upgrades.

description: Win an encounter with 10 or more junk cards in your hand, discard, and draw combined.
hint: Stall a combat encounter against enemies that shuffle Junk into your deck until you've accumulated 10, then finish them off.

description: Get struck 7 or more times in a single turn.
hint: Stack a massive amount of armor/shields or use invulnerability, then end your turn on tiles targeted by numerous weak enemy attacks.

description: Kill 5 or more invaders that are channeling doom in a single turn.
hint: Let multiple enemies begin channeling Doom. Lower their HP over a few turns, then finish 5 or more of them off simultaneously with an AOE attack.

description: Kill 10 or more invaders by playing one card.
hint: Weaken a large swarm of small enemies and use a wide Area of Effect (AOE) card, like a large Bomb or Cleave, to destroy 10+ at once.

description: Win a run without letting any Angels fly away.
hint: Angels flee after a set number of turns. Always prioritize bursting them down before their escape timer reaches zero.

description: Play a card with 10 or more repeats.
hint: Apply components or buffs that add the 'Repeat' modifier to a single low-cost attack card.
Allow the Doom meter to reach exactly 4 right before dealing the final blow to the final boss.
Successfully complete a full run on any difficulty.

description: Have a shooter kill another invader.
hint: Bait an enemy with a projectile attack into targeting you, then use a Move card to dodge so the shot hits an enemy behind you.
Reach maximum heat and play a Junk card to trigger the Overheat damage effect.
Generate bombs using cards/abilities when the grid already contains the maximum allowable number of bombs.

description: Reroll the shop or an encounter reward.
hint: Use a Chrono Token to reroll the selection screen after an encounter or in Min's shop.
Select and finish the tutorial from the main menu.

description: Defeat a boss in a single turn.
hint: Build an infinite loop or a highly optimized damage combo. Alternatively, use powerful meta-progression to burst an early-game boss down on turn 1.
Complete a full run playing as Roxy.
Complete a full run playing as Noel.
Complete a full run playing as Zeke.
Encounter and defeat the Mothership boss during a run.
Encounter and defeat the Megablob boss during a run.
Encounter and defeat the Kraken boss during a run.
Save up a large amount of currency and purchase every single card, artifact, and purge available at Min's shop in one visit.
Complete a full run playing as Hali.
Complete a full run playing as Iris.
Complete a full run playing as Xenn.
Complete a full run playing as Sura.
Complete a full run playing as Garu.
Encounter and defeat the Eclipse boss during a run.
Encounter and defeat the Nessie boss during a run.
Encounter and defeat the Queen Bees boss during a run.
Encounter and defeat the Hemophage boss during a run.
Play as Zeke or use battery-generating cards. Accumulate 10 Battery without spending it on Overdrive.

description: Kill an invader by throwing a junk card.
hint: Weaken an enemy to 1 HP, select a Junk card in your hand, and use the purge/throw action to hit them with it.

description: Get struck while your mech is shocked.
hint: Allow yourself to be hit by a shock-inflicting attack (or shock yourself), then get hit by another attack while the debuff is active.

description: Move 10 or more times in a single turn (Stinger).
hint: Use movement cards that refund cost, zero-cost moves, or movement-triggering combos to reposition 10 times in a single round.
Use a Sacrifice card or ability and target an enemy invader instead of your own friendly summons.

description: Win an encounter without spawning more than one entity (Keeper).
hint: As Keeper, rely on your mech's attacks or stick to spawning and upgrading only one single summon for an entire encounter.

description: Activate 6 or more spells in a single turn.
hint: Play as Xenn. Draft multiple cheap spells and utilize mana-generation to cast 6 spells in one turn.
Hoard mana by using mana-generation cards without spending it on spells until you reach 10.

description: Spawn 5 or more unique entities in a single turn.
hint: Draft cards that spawn different types of units (drones, turrets, bombs, etc.) and play them all in one turn.

description: Kill an invader by pushing or pulling it into a hole.
hint: Use push, pull, or gravity cards to force an enemy unit into a hole on the grid for an instant kill.

description: Win an encounter without playing any attack cards.
hint: Rely on Bombs, summons, environmental hazards (like holes), or indirect damage to clear an entire encounter without playing Attack cards.

description: Sacrifice 5 or more entities in a single turn.
hint: Spawn a board full of cheap entities (like small drones) and use an AOE sacrifice or chain sacrifice abilities.

description: Activate a summon 5 or more times in a single turn.
hint: Use cards that command a summon to attack or act multiple times in a single round.
Select the 'Daily Challenge' from the main menu and successfully complete it.
In the shop, click on Min repeatedly until she gets annoyed and tells you to stop.
Fulfill the specific secret/endgame conditions to face the true final boss, the Chaos God, and defeat it.

description: Win a run with all pilots.
hint: Complete at least one successful run with every available pilot in the game.
During the Kraken boss fight, deal enough damage to a tentacle to trigger its splitting mechanic.
Complete a full run playing as Kaia.
Complete a full run playing as Shun.

description: Have 15 or more pickups on the grid at once.
hint: Avoid picking up the dropped energy/health/currency crystals from defeated enemies until there are 15 scattered on the board.
Encounter and defeat the Shambler boss during a run.
Encounter and defeat the Grandmaster boss during a run.
Spend the necessary meta-progression resources at Min to complete her research tree unlockables.
Complete a run on the Invasion difficulty tier.
Complete a run on the Apocalypse difficulty tier.

description: Unlock all bosses and invaders in the game.
hint: Play through the game enough times to encounter every enemy type and boss to fill out the compendium.

display_name: Why Can't I Hold All These Cards?
hint: Use draw cards and artifacts that increase your hand limit or retain cards until your hand reaches 12.

description: Win a run on Post-Apocalypse difficulty.
hint: Complete a run on the Post-Apocalypse difficulty tier.

description: Win a run on Post-Post-Apocalypse difficulty.
hint: Complete a run on the Post-Post-Apocalypse difficulty tier.

description: Win a run on Impossible difficulty.
hint: Complete a run on the Impossible difficulty tier.

description: Complete ALL challenges in the game.
hint: Complete every single pilot-specific scenario/puzzle available in the Challenges menu.
Complete all scenarios for Roxy in the Challenges menu.
Complete all scenarios for Noel in the Challenges menu.
Complete all scenarios for Zeke in the Challenges menu.
Complete all scenarios for Shun in the Challenges menu.
Complete all scenarios for Hali in the Challenges menu.
Complete all scenarios for Kaia in the Challenges menu.
Complete all scenarios for Iris in the Challenges menu.
Complete all scenarios for Xenn in the Challenges menu.
Complete all scenarios for Garu in the Challenges menu.
Complete all scenarios for Sura in the Challenges menu.

description: Win a run without any components on your cards.
hint: Ignore the component installation feature entirely. Do not attach any modifiers/upgrades to your cards for the whole run.

description: Win an encounter without playing a Move card.
hint: Win a battle without playing any cards with the 'Move' tag. Rely on tanking hits or using attacks that have built-in repositioning.
Complete a full run playing as Min.
Complete a full run playing as Max.
Complete all scenarios for Min in the Challenges menu.
Complete all scenarios for Max in the Challenges menu.
Complete the true final sequence of the game, typically unlocked by beating the highest difficulties or defeating the Chaos God.
Likely related to the number 69 (e.g., deal exactly 69 damage, reach 69 combo, or have 69 health), or interacting with a specific hidden button in the menus.

description: End the turn with 8 or more Bombs on the grid at the same time.
hint: Draft multiple bomb-spawning cards and play them without detonating until 8 are present on the grid.

description: End the turn with 8 or more Shocked entities.
hint: Use widespread electric/shock AOE attacks to apply the shock status to 8 different entities simultaneously.

description: Win a run without using a Chrono Token.
hint: Do not click the Chrono Token reroll button at any shop or reward screen for an entire run.

description: Win a run without having any Starter cards remaining in your deck.
hint: Aggressively purge and replace all of your base starter cards at Min's shop and events before completing the run.

description: Win a run without Rare or Legendary cards.
hint: Only draft Common and Uncommon cards. Pass on any Rare or Legendary cards offered to you.

description: Have winstreak of 5 or more on any pilot.
hint: Successfully complete 5 runs in a row with the same pilot without dying or abandoning.

description: Win a run with 10 or more artifacts.
hint: Hunt Elites, buy artifacts in shops, and take events that grant them to end the run with 10+.

description: Win a run with 8 or more cards with components.
hint: Frequently install components/upgrades onto your cards at shops and events until at least 8 cards are modified.
